com.android.decode.configuration

类 SymbologyLengths

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.android.device.configuration.PropertyGroup
      • com.android.decode.configuration.SymbologyBase
        • com.android.decode.configuration.SymbologyLengths
  • 直接已知子类:
    Aztec, Codabar, Code128, Code39, Code93, Datamatrix, Discrete25, DotCode, Gs1DataBar_Expanded, HanXin, Interleaved25, Matrix25, Maxicode, Micropdf417, MicroQR, Msi, Pdf417, QRCode

    public class SymbologyLengths
extends SymbologyBase
    SymbologyLengths is the class to set the minimum and maximum label lengths.

    • 字段概要

      字段 
      限定符和类型 字段和说明
      NumericProperty Length1
      Length1 is one of the two configurable label lengths.
      NumericProperty Length2
      Length2 is one of the two configurable label lengths.
      EnumProperty<LengthControlMode> lengthMode
      lengthMode is the LengthControlMode selected for a label.

      • 从类继承的字段 com.android.decode.configuration.SymbologyBase

        enable

      • 从类继承的字段 com.android.device.configuration.PropertyGroup

        _groupList, _list

    • 构造器概要

      构造器 
      构造器和说明
      SymbologyLengths()
      This is an empty constructor that will not be used.
      SymbologyLengths(int enableIndex, int Length1Index, int Length2Index, int lengthModeIndex) 

    • 方法概要

      • 从类继承的方法 com.android.device.configuration.PropertyGroup

        getGroups, getProperties, isFullySupported, isSupported, load, store

      • 从类继承的方法 java.lang.Object

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • 字段详细资料

      • Length1

        public NumericProperty Length1
        Length1 is one of the two configurable label lengths. It can be used as a single fixed accepted length, when lengthMode is set to LengthControlMode.ONE_FIXED. When LengthControlMode.TWO_FIXED is enabled, its value is one of the two possible accepted fixed lengths for a specific label. It can also represent the minor or major length value whenever LengthControlMode.RANGE is selected. If is set below the accepted minimum, the smallest accepted length will be used; instead it the set value exceed the maximum value, the biggest accepted length will be used.

        Note: Length1 allowed range of values is somehow related to the nature of the barcode (linear vs 2D) but it's not intended to document in any way the scanner capabilities. An accepted minimum value and an accepted maximum value are introduced only to simplify length management in the device Scanner settings app. The chance to read a barcode depends on it's printed quality, resolution, overall size, distance from the reader, environmental light, etc...

        另请参阅:
        LengthControlMode

      • Length2

        public NumericProperty Length2
        Length2 is one of the two configurable label lengths. When LengthControlMode.TWO_FIXED is enabled, its value is one of the two possible accepted fixed lengths for a specific label. It can also represent the minor or major length value whenever LengthControlMode.RANGE is selected. If is set below the accepted minimum, the smallest accepted length will be used; instead it the set value exceed the maximum value, the biggest accepted length will be used.

        Note: Length2 allowed range of values is somehow related to the nature of the barcode (linear vs 2D) but it's not intended to document in any way the scanner capabilities. An accepted minimum value and an accepted maximum value are introduced only to simplify length management in the device Scanner settings app. The chance to read a barcode depends on it's printed quality, resolution, overall size, distance from the reader, environmental light, etc...

        另请参阅:
        LengthControlMode

      • lengthMode

        public EnumProperty<LengthControlMode> lengthMode
        lengthMode is the LengthControlMode selected for a label. Selects the length control mode.
        另请参阅:
        LengthControlMode

    • 构造器详细资料

      • SymbologyLengths

        public SymbologyLengths(int enableIndex,
                        int Length1Index,
                        int Length2Index,
                        int lengthModeIndex)

      • SymbologyLengths

        public SymbologyLengths()
        This is an empty constructor that will not be used. In the implementation a different one protected/private will be invoked. Leave it empty, do not implement. This avoids breaking code if the class is extended.
